title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Luxury, Reversible Printed Duvet Cover, Soft & Cosy Quilt Bed Set, Polycotton, Ebony-Blush Pink, Double
features: LUXURIOUS MODERN DESIGN: This reversible double duvet set is crafted from super soft material for a unique, eye-catching addition to your bedding collection.
SUPER SOFT AND SMOOTH: Crafted from supremely soft material, this stunning double duvet cover set slides smoothly across your skin as you drift off to sleep.

DURABLE AND ELEGANT: Expertly crafted to be enhancing your bedding set for a long time to come, this durable printed bed cover is the perfect way to inject contemporary elegance into your bedding collection.
PERFECT COSY COMPANION: This premium double quilt cover is designed to keep you resting at a comfortable temperature so you can stay cozy throughout the chilly nights.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
description: PRINTED DUVET COVER QUILT SET BEDDING ★ A simple way to give your bedroom a completely new look with our Contemporary Living Up to Date Style. ★ Smooth, Comfortable, and highly durable. Comfortable and super soft linen for your bedroom. ★ Sumptuous living: a step towards luxury, delicacy, and your desired softness. ★ Settle down to a restful and peaceful night’s sleep underneath this soft and comfortable duvet cover, adorned with this adorable design. ★ An attractive and modern addition to your bedroom furnishings. ★ Material Composition: Polycotton 50% Cotton, 50% Polyester ★ Available Sizes: Single: 135cm x 200cm (53" x 79"), Pillow Case ( 50x75 cm ) Double: 200cm x 200cm (79" x 79"), Pillow Cases ( 50x75 cm ) King: 230cm x 220cm (91" x 87"), Pillow Cases ( 50x75 cm ) ★ Includes: 1 Duvet Cover and two pillowcases (one pillowcase for single size option) ★ Care Instructions: Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Steam ironing may be a risk. ★ Fastening Type: Button Closure ★ Brand: Gaveno Cavailia® .
